phrases.intent_en: Where can I get military memorabilia?
phrases.cultural_note: A Feira da Ladra é famosa por antiguidades e objetos militares. As bancas de memorabilia militar estão entre as mais procuradas.

likely_response.local: Procure nas bancas de antiguidades militares.
likely_response.pronunciation: proo-KOO-rih NUHSH BAHNNG-kuhsh DIH ahnng-teeg-wee-DAH-dihsh mee-lee-TAH-rihsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Look at the military antique stalls.

responses.english: Look at the military antique stalls.
responses.phonetic: proo-KOO-rih NUHSH BAHNNG-kuhsh DIH ahnng-teeg-wee-DAH-dihsh mee-lee-TAH-rihsh.
responses.french: Procure nas bancas de antiguidades militares.

phrases.text_local: Sabes de um restaurante típico por aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: SAH-bihsh DIH OONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih TEE-pee-koo POOR uh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um feirante ou ao balcão de informações do mercado.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG fay-RAHNNG-tih OHW OW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a vendor or the market information kiosk.

responses.english: Ask a vendor or the market information kiosk.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG fay-RAHNNG-tih OHW OW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo.
responses.french: Pergunte a um feirante ou ao balcão de informações do mercado.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar um restaurante autêntico por aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR OONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih ow-TAYNG-tee-koo POOR uh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um feirante ou ao segurança do mercado por recomendações de restaurantes locais.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG fay-RAHNNG-tih OHW OW seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo POOR reh-koo-mayng-duh-SOHNYSH DIH rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tihsh loo-KEYESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a vendor or the market security guard for recommendations of local restaurants.

responses.english: Ask a vendor or the market security guard for recommendations of local restaurants.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG fay-RAHNNG-tih OHW OW seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo POOR reh-koo-mayng-duh-SOHNYSH DIH rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tihsh loo-KEYESH.
responses.french: Pergunte a um feirante ou ao segurança do mercado por recomendações de restaurantes locais.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o balcão de informações do mercado?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo?

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um segurança do mercado ou a um feirante sobre a localização do balcão de informações.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo OHW AH OONNG fay-RAHNNG-tih SOHB-rih AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN DOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a market security guard or a vendor for the location of the information kiosk.

responses.english: Ask a market security guard or a vendor for the location of the information kiosk.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo OHW AH OONNG fay-RAHNNG-tih SOHB-rih AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN DOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
responses.french: Pergunte a um segurança do mercado ou a um feirante sobre a localização do balcão de informações.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the old book section?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a secção de livros usados?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SEH-sown DIH LEEV-roosh oo-ZAH-doosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Literature and decorative arts vendors often share the northern perimeter.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, pergunte a um segurança do mercado.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, ask a market security guard.

responses.english: Good morning, ask a market security guard.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo.
responses.french: Bom dia, pergunte a um segurança do mercado.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar serviços de avaliação de antiguidades aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR seh-ruh-VEE-soosh DIH uh-vuh-leeuh-SOWN DIH ahnng-teeg-wee-DAH-dihsh uh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Pode pedir ajuda no balcão de informações do mercado ou perguntar a um feirante experiente.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih pih-DEER uh-ZHOO-duh NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo OHW peh-ruh-goonng-TAHR AH OONNG fay-RAHNNG-tih ehsh-pih-REEAYNG-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: You can ask for help at the market information kiosk or ask an experienced vendor.

responses.english: You can ask for help at the market information kiosk or ask an experienced vendor.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih pih-DEER uh-ZHOO-duh NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo OHW peh-ruh-goonng-TAHR AH OONNG fay-RAHNNG-tih ehsh-pih-REEAYNG-tih.
responses.french: Pode pedir ajuda no balcão de informações do mercado ou perguntar a um feirante experiente.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the São Vicente view?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a vista para São Vicente?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FI-ka-WUH (link a) VIS-ta PA-ra SAW (nasal) vi-SEN-chee
phrases.cultural_note: The elevated eastern edge offers unobstructed sightlines to the basilica.

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um feirante perto das barracas de antiguidades.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG fay-RAHNNG-tih PEHR-too DUHSH buh-RAH-kuhsh DIH ahnng-teeg-wee-DAH-dihsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a vendor near the antique stalls.

responses.english: Ask a vendor near the antique stalls.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG fay-RAHNNG-tih PEHR-too DUHSH buh-RAH-kuhsh DIH ahnng-teeg-wee-DAH-dihsh.
responses.french: Pergunte a um feirante perto das barracas de antiguidades.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar azulejos vintage nesta feira?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh veen-TAH-zhih NEHSH-tuh FAY-ruh?

likely_response.local: Pergunte aos feirantes; eles sabem onde estão as barracas de azulejos.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih UHOOSH fay-RAHNNG-tihsh; EH-lihsh SAH-bayng OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN UHSH buh-RAH-kuhsh DIH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the vendors; they know where the azulejo stalls are.

responses.english: Ask the vendors; they know where the azulejo stalls are.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih UHOOSH fay-RAHNNG-tihsh; EH-lihsh SAH-bayng OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN UHSH buh-RAH-kuhsh DIH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh.
responses.french: Pergunte aos feirantes; eles sabem onde estão as barracas de azulejos.

phrases.intent_en: Where are the vintage azulejo stalls?
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam as bancas de azulejos antigos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng UHSH BAHNNG-kuhsh DIH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh ahnng-TEE-goosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Vendors cluster by category but relocate weekly; follow the tile displays.

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um feirante ou segurança.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG fay-RAHNNG-tih OHW seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a vendor or security guard.

responses.english: Ask a vendor or security guard.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG fay-RAHNNG-tih OHW seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh.
responses.french: Pergunte a um feirante ou segurança.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the market information kiosk?
phrases.text_local: Olá, onde fica o quiosque de informações?
phrases.pronunciation: aw-LAH, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KEEOHSH-kih DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH?
phrases.cultural_note: The market's information kiosk is typically located near the main entrance on Rua de São Vicente.

likely_response.translation_en: Near the entrance, on the right.

responses.english: Near the entrance, on the right.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the best São Vicente view?
phrases.text_local: Onde está a melhor vista de São Vicente?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH mih-LYAWR VEESH-tuh DIH SOWN vee-SAYNG-tih?
phrases.cultural_note: The designated inner terrace provides the clearest photographic angle.

likely_response.local: Suba à muralha junto ao Panteão.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOO-buh AH moo-RAH-lyuh ZHOONNG-too OW pahnng-TEEOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: The best view is in the area of the market that overlooks the Monastery of São Vicente and the National Pantheon.

responses.english: The best view is in the area of the market that overlooks the Monastery of São Vicente and the National Pantheon.
responses.phonetic: SOO-buh AH moo-RAH-lyuh ZHOONNG-too OW pahnng-TEEOWN.
responses.french: Suba à muralha junto ao Panteão.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I validate my tram 28 ticket?
phrases.text_local: Onde valido o bilhete do elétrico 28?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih vuh-LEE-doo AW bee-LYEH-tih DOO eh-LEHT-ree-koo VEEN-tiheeoy-too?
phrases.cultural_note: O elétrico 28 é uma linha turística emblemática de Lisboa. Os validadores encontram-se nas paragens, inclusive junto à Feira da Ladra.

likely_response.local: Nos validadores dentro do próprio elétrico.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOOSH vuh-lee-duh-DOH-rihsh DAYNGT-roo DOO PRAWPR-yoo eh-LEHT-ree-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: At the validators inside the tram itself.

responses.english: At the validators inside the tram itself.
responses.phonetic: NOOSH vuh-lee-duh-DOH-rihsh DAYNGT-roo DOO PRAWPR-yoo eh-LEHT-ree-koo.
responses.french: Nos validadores dentro do próprio elétrico.

phrases.intent_en: Where are the old book stalls?
phrases.text_local: Onde estão as bancas de livros antigos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN UHSH BAHNNG-kuhsh DIH LEEV-roosh ahnng-TEE-goosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Book vendors occupy the ground floor near the main access points.

likely_response.translation_en: Ask a vendor or market security guard.

responses.english: Ask a vendor or market security guard.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG fay-RAHNNG-tih OHW seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo.
responses.french: Pergunte a um feirante ou segurança do mercado.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the market information kiosk?
phrases.text_local: Olá, onde fica o quiosque de informações?
phrases.pronunciation: aw-LAH, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KEEOHSH-kih DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH?
phrases.cultural_note: The market's information kiosk is typically located near the main entrance on Rua de São Vicente.
